# Chris Weidman integration matches
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-13-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-14-    steps:
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-15-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-16-        with:
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-17-          ref: main
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-18-      - name: Build compact architecture reports
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-19-        shell: bash
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-20-        run: |
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-21-          rm -rf codex-reports
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-22-          mkdir -p codex-reports
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-23-          git ls-files > codex-reports/files.txt
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-24-          {
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml:25:            echo '# Chris Weidman integration matches'
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml:26:            git grep -n -I -C 12 'Chris Weidman' -- ':!codex-architecture-report.txt' ':!codex-reports/*' || true
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-27-          } > codex-reports/weidman-context.txt
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-28-          {
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-29-            echo '# Architecture symbol matches'
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-30-            for pattern in EXPECTED_FIGHTER expectedFighter fighterCount completeFighterCount CANONICAL FIGHT_LEDGER COMPARE_PROFILE COMPARE_FIGHT_LEDGER ERA_MEMBERSHIP ERA_LEDGER primeStart primeEnd CHAMPIONSHIP OPPONENT_QUALITY QUALITY_WIN APEX divisionEra category-calculators ranking-pipeline production-ranking-bootstrap; do
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-31-              echo
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-32-              echo "## $pattern"
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-33-              git grep -n -I "$pattern" -- ':!codex-architecture-report.txt' ':!codex-reports/*' | head -n 250 || true
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-34-            done
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-35-          } > codex-reports/symbols.txt
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-36-          cp package.json codex-reports/package.json 2>/dev/null || true
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-37-          cp index.html codex-reports/index.html
.github/workflows/codex-source-snapshot.yml-38-          rm -f codex-architecture-report.txt

assets/data/ranking-data-additions.js-28-  function upsertByFighter(rows,row){ if(!Array.isArray(rows) || !row?.fighter) return; const index = rows.findIndex(x => x?.fighter === row.fighter); if(index >= 0){ rows[index] = { ...rows[index], ...row }; return; } rows.push(row); }
assets/data/ranking-data-additions.js-29-  function refreshCompareOptions(){ const names = [...(DATA.fighters || [])].map(f => f.fighter).filter(Boolean).sort((a,b) => a.localeCompare(b)); ['fighterA','fighterB'].forEach(id => { const select = document.getElementById(id); if(!select) return; const current = select.value; select.innerHTML = ''; names.forEach(name => { const option = document.createElement('option'); option.value = name; option.textContent = name; select.appendChild(option); }); select.value = names.includes(current) ? current : (id === 'fighterA' ? 'Jon Jones' : 'Georges St-Pierre'); }); }
assets/data/ranking-data-additions.js-30-  function apply(){ const names = []; ADDITIONS.forEach(item => { upsertByFighter(DATA.men, item.boardRow); upsertByFighter(DATA.fighters, item.profile); names.push(item.boardRow.fighter); }); if(Array.isArray(DATA.men)) DATA.men.sort((a,b)=>Number(b.totalScore||0)-Number(a.totalScore||0)); DATA.meta = { ...(DATA.meta || {}), handAddedFighters: Array.from(new Set([...(DATA.meta?.handAddedFighters || []), ...names])) }; refreshCompareOptions(); if(typeof refresh === 'function') refresh(); window.UFC_RANKING_DATA_ADDITIONS = { version: VERSION, fighters: names, appliedAt: new Date().toISOString() }; }

octagon-verdict-knowledge.md-5894-
octagon-verdict-knowledge.md-5895-- **Best counterargument:** Cejudo’s argument is peak efficiency. He did a lot in a small window, and his best wins are loud enough to make him dangerous in almost any comparison.
octagon-verdict-knowledge.md-5896-- **Why this résumé can still win:** Cejudo wins when compact championship achievement and two-division value matter more than long-term title volume.

octagon-verdict-knowledge.md-5900-Cejudo is the compact double-champ case: one of the most efficient achievement bursts in UFC history, but too short to outrank deeper long-reign resumes.
